case_title: STEPHEN MALLOY VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SC-105 REQUEST*** FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALLOY, STEPHEN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2025 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY MALLOY, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-06-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF STEPHEN MALLOY APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALLOY, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER ON SC-105A MUST GO TO COURT TO BE HEARD. HEARING DATE 12-10-25 @ 1:30 PM
STIPULATION TO USE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY MALLOY, STEPHEN CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALLOY, STEPHEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF RE EXHAUSTION OF ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES/TIMELINESS OF CLAIM RELATED TO THIS PARTICULAR FEBRUARY 2023 INCIDENT. COURT DOES NOT FIND THE TIME FOR CLAIM WAS TOLLED UNTIL PLAINTIFF SOUGHT MEDICAL CARE IN JULY 2024, SUCH THAT HIS CLAIM ONLY ACCRUED AT THAT POINT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAURA KRAMER SUJEETH. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF STEPHEN MALLOY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR HEARING PER SC-105A ORDER FILED ON NOVEMBER 18, 2025 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS HEARING SET FOR DEC-10-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALLOY, STEPHEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF RE EXHAUSTION OF ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES/TIMELINESS OF CLAIM RELATED TO THIS PARTICULAR FEBRUARY 2023 INCIDENT. COURT DOES NOT FIND THE TIME FOR CLAIM WAS TOLLED UNTIL PLAINTIFF SOUGHT MEDICAL CARE IN JULY 2024, SUCH THAT HIS CLAIM ONLY ACCRUED AT THAT POINT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
